title: Resolution approving and adopting the Municipal Development Council (MDC) Resolution No. 17 dated October 21, 2019, entitled ? Resolution realigning an item under the 20% Municipal Development Fund CY 2019 continuing appropriations amounting to Php 1,096,000.00 for various purposes and further approving the same.
